biological_replicate: we were able to extract from six biological samples
technical_replicate: showed a consistent reduction of this peptide in the acinus-2 pinin double mutant in all three replicates
experimental_design: forward sample F1 (14N Col/15N acinus-2 pinin-1) and two reverse samples R1 and R2 (14N acinus-2 pinin-1/15N Col)
factor_value: 14N Col/15N acinus-2 pinin-1 and 14N acinus-2 pinin-1/15N Col
number_of_fractions: Two segments [upper part (U) ranging from the loading well to ~50  KD; lower part (L) ranging from ~50 KD to the dye front]
